name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about hearing claim, messed up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about hearing claim, messed up?

acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, as they minimize; don't discuss more without lawyer.[5] Context: Adjusters seek low settlements.[5] Key factors: Recorded statements used against you.[5] Practical guidance: Stop talking, get attorney to renegotiate; preserve rights.[7] Lawyer fixes early mistakes.
